system.description: As a Main Action, focus on a living creature within 10 meters. They must make a Mental save; on a success, nothing happens but they are unaware of your attempt. On a failure, roll 1d6 per character level; if your total is equal or higher than their current hit points, they become paralyzed and insensate until you release them or the scene ends. They remember absolutely nothing that happened during the scene, filling in any blanks with their own natural assumptions. This mutation can target a given creature only once per scene. After the first time you use this mutation in a scene, additional uses add 1 System Strain.
